{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sirifel
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The people of [[Sirifel]] are mentioned by the [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
